ksa_text: Evaluate AI application performance against defined quality, safety, and reliability criteria, documenting test results and identified failure modes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Identify and submit exemplary AI use cases, best practices, failure modes, and risk mitigation strategies, including after-action reports.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated security control testing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Identify and submit exemplary AI use cases, best practices, failure modes, and risk mitigation strategies, including after-action reports.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-007 (AI, Task) maps to Survey Researcher scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5358 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.536, eu_ai_act=0.505, onet=0.438. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AI-T-007 with composite 0.5358 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5358 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AI domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AI domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5358 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-007 (composite 0.5358) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5358 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.5358 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5358, domain AI. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
